name: ai-control-plane-demo
description: One-click Cloudflare demo that provisions an AI Gateway and an MCP Server Portal on your own account.

CF_API_TOKEN.description: Create a Cloudflare API token at https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens (Create Token > Custom Token) with these ACCOUNT permissions: AI Gateway: Edit, Zero Trust: Edit, Access: Apps and Policies: Edit, Account Settings: Read. Paste the token here. It is stored in Cloudflare Secrets Store and is never exposed in code, logs, or this app's UI.

CF_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional. Your Cloudflare account ID (32-char hex). Leave blank to let the demo detect it from the token automatically.

MCP_PORTAL_HOSTNAME.description: Optional. The hostname the MCP Server Portal will serve on once you go live (for example mcp.yourcompany.com). Leave blank to use a placeholder; you can set the real hostname later in the dashboard.
